questions.question_text: You need to retrieve a registered application ID and secret from Azure Key Vault in a Fabric notebook. Solution: Use notebookutils.credentials.getSecret and specify the key vault URL and the secret name. Does this meet the goal?

You need to retrieve a registered application ID and secret from Azure Key Vault in a Fabric notebook. Solution: Use notebookutils.credentials.putSecret and specify the key vault URL and the secret. Does this meet the goal?

You need to retrieve a registered application ID and secret from Azure Key Vault in a Fabric notebook. Solution: Use notebookutils.credentials.getSecret and specify the key vault URL and the name of a linked service. Does this meet the goal?

You have two Fabric notebooks named Load_Salesperson and Load_Orders that read data from Parquet files and write to Delta tables. Load_Orders depends on the successful execution of Load_Salesperson. You need to dynamically execute the notebooks in the correct order by using a notebook DAG pattern. How should you complete the code?

You are building a Fabric data pipeline named Dynamic Data Copy. The pipeline must receive a list of tables to copy by using a ForEach activity. The table names will be retrieved from a lookup activity. How should you complete the pipeline expression?
You must configure dynamic data masking in a Fabric warehouse so that BirthDate always displays the value 1900-01-01 and EmailAddress only shows the first and last characters of the value.
You have a Fabric workspace that contains the following items: Report1, Dashboard1, Model1, Lakehouse1. Which items can be endorsed in Fabric?
You configure source control for a Fabric workspace by using GitHub. Which permissions are required to commit code while following the principle of least privilege?

options.text: Actions (Read and write) and Contents (Read and write)
Contents (Read) and Commit statuses (Read and write)

questions.question_text: You configure Git integration for a Fabric workspace by using an Azure DevOps Git repository. Which details are required for the integration?
You must run a notebook daily at 07:00 UTC, retry twice if it fails, and refresh a semantic model after the notebook completes successfully. Which three actions should you perform?

options.text: Link refresh activity using On success
Set pipeline schedule timezone to UTC
Set notebook schedule timezone to UTC
